programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team visit Burton Constable Hall near Hull. Objects inspected by Fiona Bruce and the experts include the first transatlantic airmail letter, brought on the plane piloted by Alcock and Brown in 1919, uncomfortable diaries of an SS officer imprisoned in Britain in World War II, and letters from the founder of modern nursing, Florence Nightingale. The award for most curious acquisition of the day must go to a bronze figure which was swapped for fish and chip suppers. One family bring in 1500 shoe buckles obsessively collected by a late husband. His investment proves to be a wise decision, however, when expert Judith Miller delivers the valuation.

Anita also finds out how the village of Portmeirion became the birthplace of some famous pottery.

There is a royal line-up of relics brought in by visitors, which include a stick pin gifted to George V's page of the back stairs in Buckingham Palace. There are also mementos from Queen Victoria's champion butter maker from Balmoral, which show the skills of a dairy maid. But most extraordinary is a collection of photographs that tell the poignant story of the last days of the Russian royal family, the Romanovs, while in captivity in 1917.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Dad-to-be Shrek and his posse embark on a new, trouble-filled adventure, in search of their next king. Another fun family romp.

programme.title: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: In the final chapter of this popular animation franchise, Mike Myers voices Shrek, who is not scaring villagers away like he used to, but now agrees to autograph pitch forks. Longing for the days when he felt like a real ogre, Shrek is duped into signing a pact with the smooth-talking deal-maker, Rumpelstiltskin (Walt Dohrn). Shrek now finds himself in a twisted, alternate version of Far Far Away, where ogres are hunted, Rumpelstiltskin is king and Shrek and Fiona (Cameron Diaz) have never met. Shrek must undo all he's done in the hope of saving his friends, restoring his world and reclaiming his one true love.

programme.title: Bowfinger
programme.desc: How does Bobby Bowfinger, Hollywood's least successful director, get Kit Ramsey, Hollywood's biggest star, in his ultra low-budget film? Any way he can. With an ingenious scheme and the help of Kit's eager and nerdy brother Jiff, an ambitious and sexy wannabe and an over-the-hill diva, Bowfinger sets out to trick Kit Ramsey into the performance of a lifetime.

programme.title: Coming to America
programme.desc: Join an African Prince on an unforgettable comic quest to the New World, it's time for him to find a princess... and the mission leads him and his most loyal friends to Queens, New York. In disguise as an impoverished immigrant, the pampered prince quickly finds himself a new job, new friends, new digs, new enemies and lots of trouble.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Eddie Murphy and Jeff Garlin put their parenting skills to the test in this hilarious caper about two sacked admen and newly stay-at-home dads who open their own day-care centre.

programme.title: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: In the final chapter of this popular animation franchise, Mike Myers voices Shrek, who is not scaring villagers away like he used to, but now agrees to autograph pitch forks. Longing for the days when he felt like a real ogre, Shrek is duped into signing a pact with the smooth-talking deal-maker, Rumpelstiltskin (Walt Dohrn). Shrek now finds himself in a twisted, alternate version of Far Far Away, where ogres are hunted, Rumpelstiltskin is king and Shrek and Fiona (Cameron Diaz) have never met. Shrek must undo all he's done in the hope of saving his friends, restoring his world and reclaiming his one true love.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: Dr Sherman Klump, a kind, calorically challenged genetics professor who longs to shed his 400-pound frame in order to win the heart of the beautiful Carla Purty. So, with one swig of his experimental fat-reducing serum, Sherman becomes Buddy Love, a fast-talking, pumped up, plumped-down Don Juan. Can Sherman stop his buff alter ego before it's too late, or will Buddy have the last laugh?

programme.title: The Nutty Professor II: The Klumps
programme.desc: America's funniest family back for seconds! Eddie Murphy is hilarious when he stars as the entire Klump family in this enormous comedy blockbuster. The hilarity begins when professor Sherman Klump finds romance with fellow DNA specialist, Denise Gaines, and discovers a brilliant formula that reverses ageing. But Sherman's thin and obnoxious alter ego, Buddy Love, wants out and a big piece of the action. And when Buddy gets loose, things get seriously nutty. Now, it's up to Mama, Papa, Ernie and Granny Klump to throw their weight around and save the day in this whopping, gut-busting comedy.

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: A successful executive and womaniser finds his lifestyle choices have turned back on him when his new female boss turns out to be an even bigger deviant than he is.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie
programme.desc: George and Harold are fourth-grade BFFs who love dreaming up funny pranks. One day, they accidentally hypnotise their principal into believing he's a dimwitted hero named Captain Underpants. But when the new schoolteacher turns out to be a disgraced scientist bent on ridding the world of laughter, George, Harold and Captain Underpants must band together to stop his evil agenda.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: Dog Man, part dog, part man, is on a mission to protect and serve while chasing down the feline supervillain, Petey the Cat.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles, and Tails face Shadow, a powerful new foe. Outmatched, they form an unexpected alliance to stop him and protect the planet.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: The untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron, better known as sworn enemies, but who once were friends bonded like brothers.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: A trio of university parapsychologists lose their research grant and decide to open their own business, Ghostbusters, and almost at once are summoned to investigate the strange happenings in a Central Park West apartment. What they discover is that all Manhattan is being besieged by otherworldly demons.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Forced into slavery by the corrupt heir to the throne, Roman general Maximus becomes a gladiator. His prowess in the arena leads him to Rome, the Colosseum, and a showdown with the new emperor.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The greatest adventure of all time begins with a young crew's maiden voyage on board the most advanced starship ever created: the USS Enterprise. In the midst of an incredible journey full of optimism, intrigue, comedy and cosmic peril, the new recruits must find a way to stop an evil being whose mission of vengeance threatens all of mankind. The fate of the galaxy rests in the hands of bitter rivals born worlds apart.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: The year is 1936, Indiana Jones hears from a museum curator named Marcus Brody about a biblical artefact called The Ark of the Covenant, which can hold the key to humanly existence. Joined with Marion Ravenwood and Sallah, Jones ventures to vast places such as Nepal and Egypt to find this artefact. He will have to fight his enemy Belloq and a band of Nazis for the Lost Ark.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: After being captured by Turks during the Crusades, Robin of Locksley and a Moor, Azeem, escape back to England where Azeem vows to remain until he repays Robin for saving his life. Meanwhile, Robin's father has been murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham and when Robin returns home he vows to avenge his father's death. Even though Marian, his childhood friend, cannot help him, he escapes to the Forest of Sherwood where he joins a band of exiled villagers and becomes their leader. With their help he attempts to cleanse the land of the evil that the Sheriff has spread.

programme.title: The Woman King
programme.desc: This is the remarkable story of the Agojie, the all-female unit of warriors who protected the African Kingdom of Dahomey in the 1800s with skills and a fierceness unlike anything the world has ever seen. Inspired by true events, "The Woman King" follows the emotionally epic journey of General Nanisca as she trains the next generation of recruits and readies them for battle against an enemy determined to destroy their way of life. Some things are worth fighting for.

programme.title: Watchmen: Chapter I
programme.desc: In an alternate world, the murder of a government sponsored superhero draws his outlawed colleagues out of retirement, into a mystery that threatens their lives and the world itself.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: For centuries, two races of robotic aliens have waged a war with the fate of the universe at stake. When the battle comes to Earth, all that stands between the evil Decepticons and ultimate power is a clue held by a young teenager, Sam. Unaware that he alone is mankind's last chance for survival, Sam finds himself in a struggle between the Autobots and Decepticons with the world hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Clumsy and overweight panda, Po, dreams of becoming a kung fu master.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: In a happy suburban neighbourhood surrounded by white picket fences and flowering rose bushes sits a black house with a dead lawn. Unbeknownst to the neighbours, hidden deep beneath this home is a vast secret hideout belonging to Gru, a dastardly villain who, along with the help of his many little minions, is planning the biggest heist in the history of the world: he's going to steal the moon!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: The city needs heroes. Darkness has settled over New York City as Shredder and his evil Foot Clan have an iron grip on everything from the police to the politicians. The future is grim until four unlikely outcast brothers rise from the sewers and discover their destiny as Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles. The Turtles must work with fearless reporter April O'Neil and her wise-cracking cameraman Vern Fenwick to save the city and unravel Shredder's diabolical plan.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: Ghostbusters Inc has gone bust, but its members get a second chance in this knockabout sequel to the smash hit of 1984 when a ghostly 16th-century tyrant starts going medieval on the streets of Manhattan. Its first target is a single mum who knows she's in trouble when flowing pink slime contaminates her toddler's stroller. Who's she gonna call?

programme.title: Ned Kelly
programme.desc: You can kill a man but not a legend. Ned Kelly and his brother Dan, sons of an Irish pig thief exiled to the Australian penal colony in 1843, formed the core of the Kelly Gang (with two other men), an outlaw gang that roamed across Australia for over two wild years. Kelly was a clever bandit, making his own homemade armour, including steel chest plates and helmets, to stop bullets from stopping him. Kelly was first arrested at 16 for horse stealing, but he became an outlaw when he killed a police officer who was harassing his brother.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: After his home is conquered by the tyrannical emperors who now lead Rome, Lucius is forced to enter the Colosseum and must look to his past to find strength to return the glory of Rome to its people.

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness
programme.desc: When the crew of the Enterprise is called back home, they find an unstoppable force of terror from within their own organisation has detonated the fleet and everything it stands for, leaving our world in a state of crisis. With a personal score to settle, Captain Kirk leads a manhunt to a war zone world to capture a one man weapon of mass destruction. As our heroes are propelled into an epic chess game of life and death, love will be challenged, friendships will be torn apart, and sacrifices must be made for the only family Kirk has left: his crew.

programme.title: Barb Wire
programme.desc: Baywatch babe Pamela Anderson squeezes into a fetching black leather outfit to become the fiery Barb Wire, a sassy comic book hero who fights against injustice in the United States of 2017. Barb, a bar owner/mercenary, is persuaded to help her former lover in the fight against the fascist dictatorship now in control of the country.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The Terminator is now one of the good guys, sent back in time to protect John Connor, the boy destined to lead the freedom fighters of the future. Sarah Connor, John's mother is the quintessential survivor who has been institutionalised for her warning of the nuclear holocaust she knows is inevitable. Together, the threesome must find a way to stop the ultimate enemy - the T-1000, the most lethal Terminator ever created. This visual tour de force is also a touching human story of survival.

programme.title: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: Johnny Blaze was only a teenage stunt biker when he sold his soul to the devil. Years later, Johnny is a world renowned daredevil by day, but at night, he becomes the Ghost Rider of Marvel Comics legend. The devil's bounty hunter, he is charged with finding evil souls on earth and bringing them to hell. But when a twist of fate brings Johnny's long-lost love back into his life, Johnny realises he just might have a second chance at happiness - if he can beat the devil and win back his soul. To do so he'll have to defeat Blackheart, the devil's nemesis and wayward son, whose plot to take over his father's realm will bring hell on earth - unless Ghost Rider can stop him.

programme.title: Watchmen: Chapter II
programme.desc: Former heroes face threats. The Comedian is dead, Dr. Manhattan exiled to Mars, Ozymandias survived an attack and Rorschach is arrested.

programme.title: The Green Hornet
programme.desc: Britt Reid is a slacker by day, party animal by night, until he finds a serious career that's seriously cool: crime-fighting action hero. As the Green Hornet, he teams up with gadget wiz and martial arts master Kato to take down LA's underworld.

programme.title: Thunderbirds
programme.desc: The world's greatest rescue squad are trapped in space while an evil enemy works overtime.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po is now living his dream as The Dragon Warrior. But his new life is threatened by the emergence of a formidable villain, who plans to use a secret weapon to conquer China.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Gru, his adorable girls, and the mischievous Minions are back with a cast of unforgettable new characters in the blockbuster sequel to the worldwide phenomenon. Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world. Partnered with secret agent Lucy Wilde, Gru, along with the wildly unpredictable Minions, must figure out how to keep his cover while also keeping up with his duties as a father. Get ready for more Minion madness.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: After he is fired from the Anti-Villain League for failing to take down the latest bad guy to threaten humanity, Gru finds himself in the middle of a major identity crisis. When a mysterious stranger shows up to inform Gru that he has a long-lost twin brother who desperately wishes to follow in his twin's despicable footsteps, one former supervillain will rediscover just how good it feels to be bad.

programme.title: Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie
programme.desc: George and Harold are fourth-grade BFFs who love dreaming up funny pranks. One day, they accidentally hypnotise their principal into believing he's a dimwitted hero named Captain Underpants. But when the new schoolteacher turns out to be a disgraced scientist bent on ridding the world of laughter, George, Harold and Captain Underpants must band together to stop his evil agenda.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: After being captured by Turks during the Crusades, Robin of Locksley and a Moor, Azeem, escape back to England where Azeem vows to remain until he repays Robin for saving his life. Meanwhile, Robin's father has been murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham and when Robin returns home he vows to avenge his father's death. Even though Marian, his childhood friend, cannot help him, he escapes to the Forest of Sherwood where he joins a band of exiled villagers and becomes their leader. With their help he attempts to cleanse the land of the evil that the Sheriff has spread.

programme.title: Robin Hood (2010)
programme.desc: Robin Hood, the legendary figure of 13th century England, who along with his band of marauders confront corruption in the local village of Nottingham and lead an uprising against the crown that will forever alter the balance of world power. Whether regarded as thief or hero, one man from humble beginnings will become an eternal symbol of freedom for his people.

programme.title: Star Trek Beyond
programme.desc: Dispatched on a rescue mission to the farthest reaches of space, Captain Kirk, Spock and the crew become separated when they are ambushed with no means of escape.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: After barely escaping a raging Shanghai nightclub brawl, Indy crash-lands into the wilds of India where he uncovers a sinister scheme that has enslaved a remote village's children in a fortress-like mine. Indy must save the children and avoid becoming a slave himself to the evil Thuggee cult.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Eddie Brock is a broken man after he loses everything including his job and fiancee. Just when his life is at its lowest, he becomes host to an alien symbiote which results in extraordinary superpowers - transforming him into Venom. Will these powers be enough for this new lethal protector to defeat great evil forces, especially against the far stronger and more weaponized symbiote rival, Riot?

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Biochemist Dr Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but he inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism instead.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: For centuries, two races of robotic aliens have waged a war with the fate of the universe at stake. When the battle comes to Earth, all that stands between the evil Decepticons and ultimate power is a clue held by a young teenager, Sam. Unaware that he alone is mankind's last chance for survival, Sam finds himself in a struggle between the Autobots and Decepticons with the world hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and a new range of kick-ass weapons, the Ghostbusters battle to save the city from an uprising of mischievous ghouls.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: Cybertron has fallen. When Optimus Prime sends Bumblebee to protect Earth, he begins his journey to become the hero the Universe needs. Crash landing, with no memory of his past, Bumblebee takes refuge in a junkyard disguised as a VW Beetle. Charlie (Hailee Steinfeld), a teenager trying to find her place in the world, discovers and repairs the battle-scarred robot. When the Decepticons forge an alliance with a secret agency led by Agent Burns (John Cena) to hunt down the remaining Autobots, Bumblebee and Charlie team up to protect the world in an action-packed adventure filled with humour and heart that's fun for the whole family.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: When Po's long-lost panda father suddenly reappears, the reunited duo travels to a secret panda paradise to meet scores of hilarious new panda characters. When the supernatural villain Kai begins to sweep across China defeating all the kung fu masters, Po must do the impossible: learn to train a village full of his fun-loving, clumsy brethren to become the ultimate band of kung fu pandas.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: In Oz, two clashing witches, Elphaba and Glinda, form an unlikely friendship. Elphaba, wrongly labeled wicked, seeks to expose the corrupt Wizard ruling the land.

programme.title: Thunderbirds
programme.desc: The world's greatest rescue squad are trapped in space while an evil enemy works overtime.

programme.title: The Mummy (1999)
programme.desc: Adventurer Rick O'Connell and Egyptologist Evelyn Carnahan discover the lost city of Hamunaptra, and struggle to save the world from unspeakable evil after they inadvertently stumble upon a mummy's tomb in 1923, and the mummy is accidentally resurrected.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra
programme.desc: From the Central Asian mountains to the deserts of Egypt, through the crowded streets of Paris, to beneath the ice cap of the North Pole, the elite team of operatives known as GI Joe journey on a nonstop adventure, as they use the latest in next-generation spy technology and military equipment to fight the duplicitous arms dealer Destro, and the growing threat of the mysterious Cobra organisation from plunging the world into chaos.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Robin of Loxley returns to England after years of fighting in Crusades to find his estate destroyed and his neighbours impoverished, all by the command of the ruthless Sheriff of Nottingham. Learning that his death has been falsely reported and his love, Marian, is involved with a local politician, Robin and co-conspirator Little John launch a covert crusade against the corruption. Robin uses his lethal archery skills to intercept tax collections destined for the Sheriff's coffers, which he turns over anonymously to Marian, now a leader of the clandestine grassroots rebellion. Discovering a larger conspiracy that threatens the stability of Europe, Robin and his men launch an attack that solidifies his status as a legendary and unstoppable rebel leader.

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter
programme.desc: Kraven's complex relationship with his ruthless father starts him down a path of vengeance, motivating him to become not only the greatest hunter in the world, but also one of its most feared.

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: A young land clerk is summoned to a vampire's castle, while his wife falls under the spell of a dark force in her dreams, leading to a perilous journey into the unknown.

programme.title: Wolf Man
programme.desc: Blake and his family barricade themselves in a farmhouse after an unseen creature attacks. As the night unfolds, Blake transforms into a dangerous being, threatening his wife and daughter.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: A mysterious event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must fight against the darkness to defend our world from the Decepticons' all-consuming evil.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: After being captured by Turks during the Crusades, Robin of Locksley and a Moor, Azeem, escape back to England where Azeem vows to remain until he repays Robin for saving his life. Meanwhile, Robin's father has been murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham and when Robin returns home he vows to avenge his father's death. Even though Marian, his childhood friend, cannot help him, he escapes to the Forest of Sherwood where he joins a band of exiled villagers and becomes their leader. With their help he attempts to cleanse the land of the evil that the Sheriff has spread.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: It's supervillain versus super-sonic in an all-out race across the globe to stop the evil genius Robotnik from using Sonic's power for world domination.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: This film begins after an epic battle left a great city torn, but with the world saved. As humanity picks up the pieces, a shadowy group reveals itself in an attempt to control the direction of history ... while an ancient, powerful new menace sets Earth in its crosshairs. With help from a new cast of humans, Optimus Prime and the Autobots rise to meet their most fearsome challenge yet. In an incredible adventure, they are swept up in a war of good and evil, ultimately leading to a climactic battle across the world.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Anna Scott is the world's most famous movie star. Her picture has been plastered on the cover of every magazine, and every time she makes a movie, the entire world knows about it. William Thacker owns a travel bookstore in the quaint neighbourhood of Notting Hill. His business is stagnant, he has the roommate from hell and his love life is completely non-existent. Then one day, their paths cross and the couple comes to face the ultimate question: can two people fall in love with the whole world watching?

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Choc Chip Cookie
programme.desc: A baker in small-town Minnesota turns into an amateur detective after finding her friend and delivery driver shot to death behind her shop.

programme.title: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: Reuben Feffer is a guy who's spent his entire life playing it safe. Polly Prince is irresistible as a free-spirit who lives for the thrill of the moment. When these two comically mismatched souls collide, Reuben's world is turned upside down, as he makes an uproarious attempt to change his life from middle-of-the-road to totally-out-there.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: After breaking up with Mark Darcy, Bridget Jones's "happily ever after" hasn't quite gone according to plan. Fortysomething and single again, she decides to focus on her job as top news producer and surround herself with old friends and new. For once, Bridget has everything completely under control. What could possibly go wrong? Then her love life takes a turn and Bridget meets a dashing American named Jack, the suitor who is everything Mr. Darcy is not. In an unlikely twist she finds herself pregnant, but with one hitch she can only be fifty percent sure of the identity of her baby's father.

programme.title: Sidelined: The QB and Me
programme.desc: A headstrong dancer and a cocky quarterback fight against their feelings for each other as their post-grad future threatens to keep them apart.

programme.title: Sidelined 2: Intercepted
programme.desc: As college tests their relationship, freshman quarterback Drayton and promising dancer Dallas navigate love and distance while searching for who they're meant to be. As the pressures of ambition, recovery, and growing independence mount, the couple struggles to hold on.

programme.title: Just Go with It
programme.desc: Danny Maccabee meets the girl of his dreams, but has to enlist his loyal assistant, Katherine, to pretend to be his soon-to-be ex-wife in order to cover up a careless lie.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Anna Scott is the world's most famous movie star. Her picture has been plastered on the cover of every magazine, and every time she makes a movie, the entire world knows about it. William Thacker owns a travel bookstore in the quaint neighbourhood of Notting Hill. His business is stagnant, he has the roommate from hell and his love life is completely non-existent. Then one day, their paths cross and the couple comes to face the ultimate question: can two people fall in love with the whole world watching?

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Choc Chip Cookie
programme.desc: A baker in small-town Minnesota turns into an amateur detective after finding her friend and delivery driver shot to death behind her shop.

programme.title: Mack & Rita
programme.desc: Mack is tired of doing all the things she has to do to keep up with her friends and become successful in her 30s. Her deepest wish is to be an older woman so she can just chill out and wear a good chunky sweater. But when she's struck by lightning in a sound bath regression pod at Coachella and becomes Rita, a 65-year-old woman, Mack learns that the reality of being an older age isn't quite what she imagined.

programme.title: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: Reuben Feffer is a guy who's spent his entire life playing it safe. Polly Prince is irresistible as a free-spirit who lives for the thrill of the moment. When these two comically mismatched souls collide, Reuben's world is turned upside down, as he makes an uproarious attempt to change his life from middle-of-the-road to totally-out-there.

programme.title: Sidelined: The QB and Me
programme.desc: A headstrong dancer and a cocky quarterback fight against their feelings for each other as their post-grad future threatens to keep them apart.

programme.title: Sidelined 2: Intercepted
programme.desc: As college tests their relationship, freshman quarterback Drayton and promising dancer Dallas navigate love and distance while searching for who they're meant to be. As the pressures of ambition, recovery, and growing independence mount, the couple struggles to hold on.

programme.title: Just Go with It
programme.desc: Danny Maccabee meets the girl of his dreams, but has to enlist his loyal assistant, Katherine, to pretend to be his soon-to-be ex-wife in order to cover up a careless lie.

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: Alex Whitman, a New York based site manager who builds nightclubs, is assigned to Las Vegas for his latest project. One night he meets Isabel Fuentes, a Mexican born photographer, and they end up sleeping together. The next morning she slips out and then shows up three months later to inform him that she's pregnant. She doesn't want to marry, but instead wants him to act like her boyfriend, so that her parents and other family members will get to meet the man she'll later say is the father of her baby. Things get complicated, however, when a romance blossoms between them and they quickly get married in a Vegas chapel. This doesn't go over well with her Mexican and his Manhattan parents. That, and their inability to decide where to live, begins to put a strain on their marriage. From that point on, they try to work things out as they have an on again, off again relationship.

programme.title: Her
programme.desc: Set in the Los Angeles of the slight future, this film follows Theodore Twombly, a complex, soulful man who makes his living writing touching, personal letters for other people. Heartbroken after the end of a long relationship, he becomes intrigued with a new, advanced operating system, which promises to be an intuitive entity in its own right, individual to each user. Upon initiating it, he is delighted to meet "Samantha", a bright, female voice, who is insightful, sensitive and surprisingly funny. As her needs and desires grow, in tandem with his own, their friendship deepens into an eventual love for each other. An original love story that explores the evolving nature - and the risks - of intimacy in the modern world.

programme.title: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: In one of the most surprising and unusual love stories, directed by Adrian Lyne, Robert Redford and Woody Harrelson star with Demi Moore in this sizzling, controversial exploration of modern love and morality where a billionaire offers David one million dollars for one night with his wife, Diana. David and Diana Murphy can end their financial worries if they accept the offer of billionaire financier John Gage. But will David and Diana accept? If they do, can their marriage survive? One million dollars, no questions asked - one night with Diana, nothing more.

programme.title: Far and Away
programme.desc: Ron Howard's epic tale tells the story of two Irish immigrants' quest for land during the 1800s Oklahoma land rush. Joseph Donnelly is an ambitious young farmer in western Ireland. When a local protest against wealthy landlord Daniel Christie results in the death of his father, Joseph seeks revenge. But his attempt vengeance is thwarted by Shannon Christie, the landlord's high-spirited and headstrong daughter, who stabs Joseph with a pitchfork. While convalescing at the Christie's manor, Joseph is propositioned by Shannon, who asks him to travel with her to America - where she is determined to acquire some of the free land being given away in the Oklahoma Territory. Arriving in Boston, Joseph acts as a protective brother to Shannon in the foreign city streets as they struggle to earn the money to travel out west.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Jo March reflects back and forth on her life, telling the beloved story of the March sisters - four young women, each determined to live life on her own terms.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: There are a million reasons not to like realtor Oren Little, and that's just the way he likes it. Wilfully obnoxious to anyone who might cross his path, he wants nothing more than to sell one last house and retire in peace and quiet, until his estranged son suddenly drops off a granddaughter he never knew existed and turns his life upside-down. Clueless about how to care for a sweet, abandoned nine-year-old, he pawns her off to his determined and lovable neighbour Leah and tries to resume his life uninterrupted. But little by little, Oren stubbornly learns to open his heart to his family, to Leah and to life itself.

programme.title: Something Borrowed
programme.desc: Rachel is a generous and loyal pal to her engaged best friend, Darcy. But after celebrating her 30th birthday, perpetual good girl Rachel unexpectedly ends up in the arms of Dex, the guy she's had a crush on since law school - who happens to be Darcy's fiance. In the frantic weeks leading up to Darcy's wedding, Rachel finds herself caught between her long-time friendship with Darcy and the prospect of losing the love of her life.

programme.title: Her
programme.desc: Set in the Los Angeles of the slight future, this film follows Theodore Twombly, a complex, soulful man who makes his living writing touching, personal letters for other people. Heartbroken after the end of a long relationship, he becomes intrigued with a new, advanced operating system, which promises to be an intuitive entity in its own right, individual to each user. Upon initiating it, he is delighted to meet "Samantha", a bright, female voice, who is insightful, sensitive and surprisingly funny. As her needs and desires grow, in tandem with his own, their friendship deepens into an eventual love for each other. An original love story that explores the evolving nature - and the risks - of intimacy in the modern world.

programme.title: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: In one of the most surprising and unusual love stories, directed by Adrian Lyne, Robert Redford and Woody Harrelson star with Demi Moore in this sizzling, controversial exploration of modern love and morality where a billionaire offers David one million dollars for one night with his wife, Diana. David and Diana Murphy can end their financial worries if they accept the offer of billionaire financier John Gage. But will David and Diana accept? If they do, can their marriage survive? One million dollars, no questions asked - one night with Diana, nothing more.

programme.title: Far and Away
programme.desc: Ron Howard's epic tale tells the story of two Irish immigrants' quest for land during the 1800s Oklahoma land rush. Joseph Donnelly is an ambitious young farmer in western Ireland. When a local protest against wealthy landlord Daniel Christie results in the death of his father, Joseph seeks revenge. But his attempt vengeance is thwarted by Shannon Christie, the landlord's high-spirited and headstrong daughter, who stabs Joseph with a pitchfork. While convalescing at the Christie's manor, Joseph is propositioned by Shannon, who asks him to travel with her to America - where she is determined to acquire some of the free land being given away in the Oklahoma Territory. Arriving in Boston, Joseph acts as a protective brother to Shannon in the foreign city streets as they struggle to earn the money to travel out west.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Join Diane Keaton, Bette Midler and Goldie Hawn in this sinfully satisfying revenge romp about a trio of first wives who team up to teach their lying, cheating ex-husbands a lesson. Ivana Trump's galvanising cameo - 'don't get mad, dahlinks, get everytink' - sets the scene in a comedy that hinges on the self-mockery of its ageless stars. Midler's ball-busting shtick, Keaton's ditsy vulnerability and Hawn's eternal youth are just light-hearted grist for the mill of female friendship as a serious source of strength.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: There are a million reasons not to like realtor Oren Little, and that's just the way he likes it. Wilfully obnoxious to anyone who might cross his path, he wants nothing more than to sell one last house and retire in peace and quiet, until his estranged son suddenly drops off a granddaughter he never knew existed and turns his life upside-down. Clueless about how to care for a sweet, abandoned nine-year-old, he pawns her off to his determined and lovable neighbour Leah and tries to resume his life uninterrupted. But little by little, Oren stubbornly learns to open his heart to his family, to Leah and to life itself.

programme.title: The Break-Up
programme.desc: After two years together, Gary and Brooke's relationship seems to have taken a comical wrong turn on the way to happily ever after.

programme.title: Some Kind of Wonderful
programme.desc: From the director of Pretty in Pink, comes this high-school romance starring Eric Stoltz as a misfit whose crush on a teen queen takes him on a voyage of self discovery. Keith (Stoltz) thinks he is in love with Amanda (Lea Thompson) while tomboy Watts (Mary Stuart Masterson) pines for Keith. Meanwhile, Amanda wishes she were loved by her current boyfriend, Hardy Jenns ( Craig Sheffer), whilst Hardy is only in love with himself.

programme.title: Picnic
programme.desc: The son of the richest man in town wants to marry the town's beauty queen, but then she meets an interesting stranger who just got off the train.

programme.title: Suddenly 30
programme.desc: A hilarious flash-forward romance about a pre-teen girl who goes from geek to glamorous. With the help of some magic wishing dust, 13-year-old Jenna Rink becomes 30 and gorgeous overnight, with everything she ever wanted, except for her best friend Matt. Now, this grown woman must create some magic of her own to help the little girl inside find the true love she left behind.

programme.title: Marry Me
programme.desc: A heartbroken pop star spontaneously weds a stranger from the audience while live on stage, but their sham marriage turns into a real romance.

programme.title: The Five-Year Engagement
programme.desc: An engaged couple keep getting tripped up on their long walk down the aisle.

programme.title: Emma.
programme.desc: Jane Austen's beloved comedy about finding your equal and earning your happy ending is reimagined in this delicious film adaptation.

programme.title: The Break-Up
programme.desc: After two years together, Gary and Brooke's relationship seems to have taken a comical wrong turn on the way to happily ever after.

programme.title: Some Kind of Wonderful
programme.desc: From the director of Pretty in Pink, comes this high-school romance starring Eric Stoltz as a misfit whose crush on a teen queen takes him on a voyage of self discovery. Meanwhile, Amanda wishes she were loved by her current boyfriend, Hardy Jenns ( Craig Sheffer), whilst Hardy is only in love with himself.

programme.title: Picnic
programme.desc: The son of the richest man in town wants to marry the town's beauty queen, but then she meets an interesting stranger who just got off the train.

programme.title: Step Up
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel crosses the path of a beautiful ballerina his gift for dance is revealed. Soon he is torn between his past life and a journey for a dream.

programme.title: Marry Me
programme.desc: A heartbroken pop star spontaneously weds a stranger from the audience while live on stage, but their sham marriage turns into a real romance.

programme.title: The Five-Year Engagement
programme.desc: An engaged couple keep getting tripped up on their long walk down the aisle.

programme.title: Emma.
programme.desc: Jane Austen's beloved comedy about finding your equal and earning your happy ending is reimagined in this delicious film adaptation.

programme.title: Duplicity
programme.desc: When two sexy spies-turned-corporate operatives in the midst of a clandestine love affair find themselves on either side of an all-out corporate war, they'll put everything on the line to remain one double-cross ahead in a high-stakes game of cat-and-mouse.

programme.title: This Time Next Year
programme.desc: Minnie and Quinn are born on the same day, one minute apart. Their lives may begin together, but their worlds couldn't be more different. Years later they find themselves together again. Maybe it's time to take a chance on love.

programme.title: Perfect Romance
programme.desc: In the process of matchmaking for her daughter, a mother meets an unlikely romantic interest.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It
programme.desc: Lindsey travels to Ireland to acquire land for a resort. She decides to enter the town's matchmaking festival to prove her investment in the community and win over a handsome local.

programme.title: Easter Under Wraps
programme.desc: A woman goes undercover at her family's chocolate factory to find out why sales are down. She meets the head chocolatier, who has new ideas for Easter products.

programme.title: It Could Happen to You
programme.desc: In this heart-warming comedy, Charlie Lang buys a lottery ticket, leaving him short of cash to tip Yvonne, the waitress in his favourite lunch spot. Charlie offers her half the winnings and when the ticket pays $4 million, he incurs the wrath of his wife, Muriel, by honouring his promise. Muriel screams and goes manic when the winning number is read on the TV, and she screams twice as loud when Charlie finally tells her what he has done. As Charlie and Muriel grow apart, Charlie and Yvonne grow together.

programme.title: Duplicity
programme.desc: When two sexy spies-turned-corporate operatives in the midst of a clandestine love affair find themselves on either side of an all-out corporate war, they'll put everything on the line to remain one double-cross ahead in a high-stakes game of cat-and-mouse.

programme.title: This Time Next Year
programme.desc: Minnie and Quinn are born on the same day, one minute apart. Their lives may begin together, but their worlds couldn't be more different. Years later they find themselves together again. Maybe it's time to take a chance on love.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: At the age of 21, Tim Lake discovers he can travel in time. The night after another unsatisfactory New Year party, Tim's father tells his son that the men in his family have always had the ability to travel through time. Tim can't change history, but he can change what happens and has happened in his own life - so he decides to make his world a better place ... by getting a girlfriend. Sadly, that turns out not to be as easy as you might think. Moving from the Cornwall coast to London to train as a lawyer, Tim finally meets the beautiful but insecure Mary. They fall in love, then an unfortunate time-travel incident means he's never met her at all. So they meet for the first time again-and again-but finally, after a lot of cunning time-traveling, he wins her heart. Tim then uses his power to create the perfect romantic proposal, to save his wedding from the worst best-man speeches, to save his best friend from professional disaster and to get his pregnant wife to the hospital in time for the birth of their daughter, despite a nasty traffic jam outside Abbey Road. But as his unusual life progresses, Tim finds out that his unique gift can't save him from the sorrows and ups and downs that affect all families, everywhere. There are great limits to what time travel can achieve, and it can be dangerous too. This is a comedy about love and time travel, which discovers that, in the end, making the most of life may not need time travel at all.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A home-schooled newcomer is introduced to the blackboard jungle, where she joins the social outcasts in a planned sabotage of the cool kids.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It
programme.desc: Lindsey travels to Ireland to acquire land for a resort. She decides to enter the town's matchmaking festival to prove her investment in the community and win over a handsome local.

programme.title: Easter Under Wraps
programme.desc: A woman goes undercover at her family's chocolate factory to find out why sales are down. She meets the head chocolatier, who has new ideas for Easter products.

programme.title: It Could Happen to You
programme.desc: In this heart-warming comedy, Charlie Lang buys a lottery ticket, leaving him short of cash to tip Yvonne, the waitress in his favourite lunch spot. Charlie offers her half the winnings and when the ticket pays $4 million, he incurs the wrath of his wife, Muriel, by honouring his promise. Muriel screams and goes manic when the winning number is read on the TV, and she screams twice as loud when Charlie finally tells her what he has done. As Charlie and Muriel grow apart, Charlie and Yvonne grow together.

programme.title: Only You
programme.desc: An incurable romantic throws caution to the wind and goes to Italy in search of an elusive soul mate. Faith has waited all her life to meet Damon Bradley, the name given as her eventual soul mate both by her ouija board, at age 11, and a carnival fortune teller. Now, just days before her marriage, Faith receives a call from her fiance's old friend, Damon Bradley, who phones with best wishes on his way to Venice, Italy. Determined to get at least a glimpse of the man before her wedding she grabs Kate, her best friend and takes the next plane to Italy. There, she bumps instead into Peter, who instantly knows Faith is his soul mate, now all he has to do is convince her.

programme.title: Mona Lisa Smile
programme.desc: A funny, inspiring and uplifting film about an art history professor with a lot to teach about life and much to learn about romance.

programme.title: The Princess and the Marine
programme.desc: Based on a true story about a US marine stationed in Bahrain who falls in love with a member of the Bahrain royal family.

programme.title: Matchmaker Mysteries: A Fatal Romance
programme.desc: When a romance writer is murdered, matchmaker Angie Dove and Detective Kyle Cooper must read between the lines to find the killer.

programme.title: At Home in Mitford
programme.desc: Cynthia leaves Boston to spend time in her late uncle's small town in hopes of alleviating writer's block. She meets a man, and as the pair work together to help a boy, they find solace and romance.

programme.title: The Story of Us
programme.desc: After 15 years of marriage, Ben is still the free-spirited person he's always been while Katie is left to handle life's messy little problems. So when the kids go off to summer camp, they face the most important decision of their married life. Do they end their story or begin a new chapter? From start to finish, this film gives us reason to laugh and cry in an entertaining outlook on marriage.

programme.title: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: In one of the most surprising and unusual love stories, directed by Adrian Lyne, Robert Redford and Woody Harrelson star with Demi Moore in this sizzling, controversial exploration of modern love and morality where a billionaire offers David one million dollars for one night with his wife, Diana. David and Diana Murphy can end their financial worries if they accept the offer of billionaire financier John Gage. But will David and Diana accept? If they do, can their marriage survive? One million dollars, no questions asked - one night with Diana, nothing more.

programme.title: Only You
programme.desc: An incurable romantic throws caution to the wind and goes to Italy in search of an elusive soul mate. Faith has waited all her life to meet Damon Bradley, the name given as her eventual soul mate both by her ouija board, at age 11, and a carnival fortune teller. Now, just days before her marriage, Faith receives a call from her fiance's old friend, Damon Bradley, who phones with best wishes on his way to Venice, Italy. Determined to get at least a glimpse of the man before her wedding she grabs Kate, her best friend and takes the next plane to Italy. There, she bumps instead into Peter, who instantly knows Faith is his soul mate, now all he has to do is convince her.

programme.title: Wedding Wars
programme.desc: In the midst of organising his brother Ben's wedding, Shel, a gay party planner, decides to go on strike for equal rights when he learns that Ben is behind a political speech against gay marriage.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias
programme.desc: In this poignant and often hilarious film a wedding is about to take place in Chinquapin, Louisiana. Bride Shelby is a headstrong young beauty whose iron-willed mother, M'Lynn, would do anything for her. Giant-haired Dolly Parton is Truvy, the owner of the beauty parlour that serves as the town's unofficial hub. Dropping in to exchange gossip are Ouiser, the richest and meanest woman in town, and Clairee, an elegant widow with a sly delivery. The atmosphere is further enlivened by the wacky new girl, Annelle, a gawky trainee with cat-woman glasses and a mysterious past. These six 'steel magnolias' huddle together and provide each other with strength, friendship and an audience for each other's jokes as they negotiate the ups and downs of life and love in a small Southern town.

programme.title: The Princess and the Marine
programme.desc: Based on a true story about a US marine stationed in Bahrain who falls in love with a member of the Bahrain royal family.

programme.title: At Home in Mitford
programme.desc: Cynthia leaves Boston to spend time in her late uncle's small town in hopes of alleviating writer's block. She meets a man, and as the pair work together to help a boy, they find solace and romance.

programme.title: Gothika
programme.desc: A brilliant and respected criminal psychologist, Dr Miranda Grey is an expert at knowing what is rational. Under the direction of her husband, Miranda treats dangerously disturbed patients at the Woodward Penitentiary for Women. Miranda's life is thrust into terrifying jeopardy when a cryptic encounter with a mysterious young girl leads to a nightmare beyond her wildest imagination.

programme.title: The Bone Collector
programme.desc: A murderer is loose on the streets of Manhattan. A diabolical killer whose brutal slayings leave a trail of cryptic messages hidden at the scene of the crime. Clues which only a brilliant mind can interpret. Lincoln Rhyme is a gifted but disabled detective who is assigned to the case as the city becomes gripped with fear. Amelia Donaghy is a feisty, street-smart policewoman, who together with Lincoln, must go inside the mind of this terrifying madman and defeat him at his own game.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A tough cop, a clever bank robber, and a powerbroker fuel a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse full of hidden agendas and explosive surprises.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Innocents Lost
programme.desc: A reinstated police chief (Tom Selleck) battles his own demons while investigating the death of a teenage girl.

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: On the verge of having their conspiracy exposed, members of the government's intelligence community will stop at nothing to erase all evidence of their top secret programs - even the agents involved. Aaron Cross must use his genetically-engineered skills to survive the ultimate game of cat-and-mouse and finish what Jason Bourne started.

programme.title: The Invisible Man
programme.desc: Cecilia tries to rebuild her life after the death of her abusive partner. But before long, she questions whether or not he is truly gone.

programme.title: Gothika
programme.desc: A brilliant and respected criminal psychologist, Dr Miranda Grey is an expert at knowing what is rational. Under the direction of her husband, Miranda treats dangerously disturbed patients at the Woodward Penitentiary for Women. programme.title: The Invisible Man
programme.desc: Cecilia tries to rebuild her life after the death of her abusive partner. But before long, she questions whether or not he is truly gone.

programme.title: Belfast
programme.desc: A poignant story of one boy's childhood amid the music and social tumult of the late 1960s.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A Harvard professor implicated in a murder must unravel an ancient code to expose the greatest conspiracy in history.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Stone Cold
programme.desc: A series of strange murders sends shivers through a quiet New England town. It's up to a hard-as-nails police chief Jesse Stone to find the psychopath behind the savage crimes.

programme.title: The Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: This film tells the story of a disfigured musical genius who haunts the catacombs beneath the Paris Opera, waging a reign of terror over its occupants. When he falls fatally in love with the lovely Christine, the Phantom devotes himself to creating a new star for the Opera, exerting a strange sense of control over the young soprano as he nurtures her extraordinary talents.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: Welcome to Kehoe, it's -10 degrees and counting at this glitzy ski resort in the Rocky Mountains. The local police aren't used to much action until the son of unassuming town snowplough driver, Nels Coxman, is murdered at the order of Viking, a flamboyant drug lord. Fuelled by rage and armed with heavy machinery, Nels sets out to dismantle the cartel one man at a time, but his understanding of murder comes mainly from what he read in a crime novel. As the bodies pile up, his actions ignite a turf war between Viking and his long-standing rival White Bull, a soulful Native-American mafia boss, that will quickly escalate and turn the small town's bright white slopes blood-red.

programme.title: Children of Men
programme.desc: It's 2027. There have been no births for 18 years. Humanity is doomed. Then Clive Owen discovers the key to survival, but can he protect his precious cargo?

programme.title: Nymphomaniac: Vol 2
programme.desc: Continues with the story of self-diagnosed nymphomaniac Joe exploring her adulthood, during which her journey of self-discovery leads to darker complications.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A Harvard professor implicated in a murder must unravel an ancient code to expose the greatest conspiracy in history.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Stone Cold
programme.desc: A series of strange murders sends shivers through a quiet New England town. It's up to a hard-as-nails police chief Jesse Stone to find the psychopath behind the savage crimes.

programme.title: The Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: This film tells the story of a disfigured musical genius who haunts the catacombs beneath the Paris Opera, waging a reign of terror over its occupants. When he falls fatally in love with the lovely Christine, the Phantom devotes himself to creating a new star for the Opera, exerting a strange sense of control over the young soprano as he nurtures her extraordinary talents.

Fuelled by rage and armed with heavy machinery, Nels sets out to dismantle the cartel one man at a time, but his understanding of murder comes mainly from what he read in a crime novel. programme.title: Children of Men
programme.desc: It's 2027. There have been no births for 18 years. Humanity is doomed. Then Clive Owen discovers the key to survival, but can he protect his precious cargo?

programme.title: Hanna
programme.desc: Hanna is a teenage girl. Uniquely, she has the strength, the stamina, and the smarts of a soldier; these come from being raised by her father, an ex-CIA man, in the wilds of Finland. Living a life unlike any other teenager, her upbringing and training have been one and the same, all geared to making her the perfect assassin. The turning point in her adolescence is a sharp one; sent into the world by her father on a mission, Hanna journeys stealthily across Europe while eluding agents dispatched after her by a ruthless intelligence operative with secrets of her own. As she nears her ultimate target, Hanna faces startling revelations about her existence and unexpected questions about her humanity.

programme.title: Killer Under the Bed
programme.desc: New to town, a bullied teenager discovers a doll, riddled with pins, in her backyard shed. She soon comes to believe that the doll holds supernatural powers.

programme.title: The Boxer
programme.desc: After being in prison for his involvement with the IRA, Danny Flynn re-opens a boxing ring in effort to heal his Belfast community, finding that a legacy of violence is not easily escaped.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: The highly anticipated 9th film from Quentin Tarantino. In 1969 Los Angeles, during the Charles Manson murders, a TV actor and his stunt double, embark on an odyssey to make a name for themselves in the film industry.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: Seen through the eyes of a squad of American soldiers, the story begins with Wold War II's historic D-Day invasion, and then moves beyond the beach as the men embark on a dangerous special mission. Captain John Miller must take his men behind enemy lines to find Private James Ryan, whose three brothers have been killed in combat. Faced with impossible odds, the men question their orders. Why are eight men risking their lives to save just one? Surrounded by the brutal realities of war, each man searched for his own answer - and the strength to triumph over an uncertain future with honour, decency and courage.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: A multi-layered examination of the 2009 hijacking of the US container ship Maersk Alabama by a crew of Somali pirates. The film focuses on the relationship between the Alabama's commanding officer, Captain Richard Phillips, and the Somali pirate captain, Muse, who takes him hostage. Phillips and Muse are set on an unstoppable collision course when Muse and his crew target Phillips' unarmed ship; in the ensuing standoff, 145 miles off the Somali coast, both men will find themselves at the mercy of forces beyond their control.

programme.title: Hanna
programme.desc: Hanna is a teenage girl. Uniquely, she has the strength, the stamina, and the smarts of a soldier; these come from being raised by her father, an ex-CIA man, in the wilds of Finland. Living a life unlike any other teenager, her upbringing and training have been one and the same, all geared to making her the perfect assassin. The turning point in her adolescence is a sharp one; sent into the world by her father on a mission, Hanna journeys stealthily across Europe while eluding agents dispatched after her by a ruthless intelligence operative with secrets of her own. programme.title: The Boxer
programme.desc: After being in prison for his involvement with the IRA, Danny Flynn re-opens a boxing ring in effort to heal his Belfast community, finding that a legacy of violence is not easily escaped.

programme.title: In the Name of the Father
programme.desc: Gerry Conlon is one of four men coerced into signing false confessions for the IRA bombing of the Guildford pub that killed five people. His father is also unjustly charged and imprisoned with his son. Gerry spends 14 years in prison trying to prove his innocence and clear his family's name with the help of a British lawyer. Adapted from Conlon's autobiography Proved Innocent.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: Seen through the eyes of a squad of American soldiers, the story begins with Wold War II's historic D-Day invasion, and then moves beyond the beach as the men embark on a dangerous special mission. Captain John Miller must take his men behind enemy lines to find Private James Ryan, whose three brothers have been killed in combat. Faced with impossible odds, the men question their orders. Why are eight men risking their lives to save just one? Surrounded by the brutal realities of war, each man searched for his own answer - and the strength to triumph over an uncertain future with honour, decency and courage.

programme.title: Captain Phillips

The film focuses on the relationship between the Alabama's commanding officer, Captain Richard Phillips, and the Somali pirate captain, Muse, who takes him hostage. Phillips and Muse are set on an unstoppable collision course when Muse and his crew target Phillips' unarmed ship; in the ensuing standoff, 145 miles off the Somali coast, both men will find themselves at the mercy of forces beyond their control.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: Phillip Noyce directs Angelina Jolie as Evelyn Salt, a CIA officer who swore an oath to duty, honour and country. When she is accused by a defector of being a Russian sleeper spy, Salt goes on the run to clear her name and ultimately prove her loyalty. Using all her skills and years of experience as a covert operative, she must elude capture and protect her family or the world's most powerful forces will erase any trace of her existence. With her superiors convinced she's out to assassinate the president, she also must race the clock to learn the identity of the real traitor.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: Welcome to Kehoe, it's -10 degrees and counting at this glitzy ski resort in the Rocky Mountains. The local police aren't used to much action until the son of unassuming town snowplough driver, Nels Coxman, is murdered at the order of Viking, a flamboyant drug lord. Fuelled by rage and armed with heavy machinery, Nels sets out to dismantle the cartel one man at a time, but his understanding of murder comes mainly from what he read in a crime novel. As the bodies pile up, his actions ignite a turf war between Viking and his long-standing rival White Bull, a soulful Native-American mafia boss, that will quickly escalate and turn the small town's bright white slopes blood-red.

programme.title: The Woman King
programme.desc: This is the remarkable story of the Agojie, the all-female unit of warriors who protected the African Kingdom of Dahomey in the 1800s with skills and a fierceness unlike anything the world has ever seen. Inspired by true events, "The Woman King" follows the emotionally epic journey of General Nanisca as she trains the next generation of recruits and readies them for battle against an enemy determined to destroy their way of life. Some things are worth fighting for.

programme.title: Billy Elliot
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old miner's son Billy Elliot is on his way to boxing lessons when he stumbles upon a ballet class. Billy secretly joins the class, knowing that his blue-collar family would never understand. Under the guidance of his teacher, Mrs Wilkinson, Billy's raw talent takes flight. When his father discovers his son's ambition, Billy must fight for his dreams and his destiny.

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: Otto is a grump who's given up on life following the loss of his wife, and wants to end it all. When a young family moves in nearby, he meets his match in quick-witted Marisol.

programme.title: State of Play
programme.desc: When D.C. Reporter Cal McCaffrey is assigned to investigate the murder of an assistant to an up-and-coming politician, he uncovers a conspiracy that threatens to bring down the nation's power structures. In a town of spin-doctors and wealthy power brokers, he will discover one truth: when fortunes are at stake, no one's integrity, love or life is safe.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Based on the incredible true story of Barry Seal, a drug-smuggling pilot in the 1980s who was recruited by the CIA to carry out one of the largest covert operations in history.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit

programme.title: Ned Kelly
programme.desc: You can kill a man but not a legend. Ned Kelly and his brother Dan, sons of an Irish pig thief exiled to the Australian penal colony in 1843, formed the core of the Kelly Gang (with two other men), an outlaw gang that roamed across Australia for over two wild years. Kelly was a clever bandit, making his own homemade armour, including steel chest plates and helmets, to stop bullets from stopping him. Kelly was first arrested at 16 for horse stealing, but he became an outlaw when he killed a police officer who was harassing his brother.

programme.title: Blackhat
programme.desc: After a nuclear plant is hacked by unknown culprits, an FBI agent joins forces with a convicted hacker and the Chinese in an effort to bring down the criminals.

programme.desc: A small-town police chief investigates the life of an unhappy teen after her corpse is found floating in a lake.

programme.title: Knives Out
programme.desc: Detective Benoit Blanc is enlisted to investigate the untimely death of a renowned crime novelist. Blanc must sift through a web of red herrings and lies to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For over a decade, the drivers have battled it all from ferocious storms to freezing temperatures to bitter rivalries. And, of course, they've confronted the deadly ice crossings that have tested their ability to survive. But now, as this program is in its landmark 11th season, a sense of urgency descends on the drivers. The roads are opening late and closing early. Every load could be the last one to make it up the trails. At any time, the roads could be shut down and tens of thousands of tons in freight won't be delivered. It's a rush from day one and the mission is clear: pedal to the metal and never let up. The communities are counting on them now more than ever. This episode, the ice road season is off to a bad start. Lisa Kelly finds herself in a real jam after jack-knifing her truck deep in the back country. Then, legendary trucker Alex Debogorski gets more than he bargained for when he falls through a patch of thin ice. But Todd Dewey is able to step it up when he comes to the aid of a stranded trucker.

programme.title: Outback Car Hunters
programme.desc: A hunt for a 'Batmobile' mystery car reveals a 'yank-tank' Chrysler Imperial Crown and a down-at-heel Range Rover enjoys a posh makeover.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: Not only do some drivers disobey the mobile phone rules, there are sometimes serious doubts about their ability to drive at all. Distracted drivers, known as "rubberneckers" are a constant problem when Police are exercising their duties, and more P Platers just don't understand that they have to obey ALL the rules of the road if they want to get a full licence.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: Unbelievably, a truck driver stops his big rig over a railway line, because he was following too close to the car in front. A Mercedes driver does 108Kph in an 80Kph zone, and of course, the inevitable phone drivers.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Mark Cromwell and a team of heavyweight champions drag a million dollar shed through the eye of a needle. Fuel trucker Sludge has pressure problems. Livestock trucker Brenton Holmes moves 20,000 cattle in three days.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A seller walks into the shop hoping to score with his Magic Johnson 50th birthday invitation. Is the deal a slam dunk? Then, Chum takes a look at some joker playing cards used as props in 'The Dark Knight.'.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Storage unit auctions are the newest and biggest untapped source for hidden treasures, and opportunistic individuals bid on unclaimed properties hoping to strike gold. In this character-driven treasure hunt, bidders range from twenty-somethings out for fun and adventure, willing to say or do anything to win, to husband and wife teams looking to make fast and large cash, and all are prepared to create quite the drama in the process. It's a dramatic environment as the bidders assess if they think the unit is worth a bid and how high they will actually go. In each self-contained episode, our cast of characters head to storage units and wait anxiously for the big reveal of what is behind the door. The owner of the facility will cut the lock to a delinquent unit and raise the door for the first time, allowing bidders to peer inside for a brief moment, aided only by a flashlight.

It's a dramatic environment as the bidders assess if they think the unit is worth a bid and how high they will actually go. In each self-contained episode, our cast of characters head to storage units and wait anxiously for the big reveal of what is behind the door. The owner of the facility will cut the lock to a delinquent unit and raise the door for the first time, allowing bidders to peer inside for a brief moment, aided only by a flashlight.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Mark Watson and Nish Kumar pop toast together and Sally Phillips spreads absinthe on it. Greg Davies dishes out the absurd A-list challenges once more.

programme.desc: After Martin offers him a job performing back-breaking manual labour, Jeff's life begins to turn around until he stumbles upon a dangerous secret.

programme.title: MythBusters: There's Your Problem!
programme.desc: The MythBusters dive into six water-related myths, finding out how far bullets can penetrate water; whether hitting the surface is really the same as hitting concrete; and if walking on water is possible using ninja technology. They also find out the best way to escape from a sinking car; if a shipwreck can be raised with ping pong balls; and if a sinking ship can suck you down with it.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: A speeding young P-plater in a high-powered car loses his licence for the third time, in the five months he has had it, and stunningly doesn't seem at all concerned about this record. Another young driver doesn't seem to know the rules when it comes to lane filtering, and a truck driver gets caught for not wearing a seat belt.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: The motorbike cops pull over a couple of young fellas in a flashy car, and the owner of the car, who is now a passenger, had in fact lost his learner licence for a 185km/h offence.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Mark Cromwell runs into freak weather and unexpected roadblocks. Turbo goes head-to-head with an angry customer and an angry road. Cattle trucker Shane Kenny, wrestles an old truck and big dreams.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For over a decade, the drivers have battled it all from ferocious storms to freezing temperatures to bitter rivalries. And, of course, they've confronted the deadly ice crossings that have tested their ability to survive. But now, as this program is in its landmark 11th season, a sense of urgency descends on the drivers. The roads are opening late and closing early. Every load could be the last one to make it up the trails. At any time, the roads could be shut down and tens of thousands of tons in freight won't be delivered. It's a rush from day one and the mission is clear: pedal to the metal and never let up. The communities are counting on them now more than ever.

programme.title: MythBusters: There's Your Problem!

programme.title: Black Gold
programme.desc: Big Dog Rig 28 is racing to finish the second of 4 wells in 50 days when Tool Pusher Freddy, the on-site rig manager, learns about an upcoming rig inspection. The crews are already on edge but Freddy fuels the fire when he begins telling everyone how to do their jobs as he tries to get the rig ready for inspection. Driller Pee Wee is at odds with his two new crew members. Worm Cheston makes a mistake that threatens the life of everyone on the rig and veteran Gerald schemes to take over as a driller. Freddy's micromanaging finally pushes Relief Crew Driller Oscar to walk off the rig threatening to quit. Off the rig, the pressures of the job weight heavy on hot head roughneck Brandon. Then bad news from his girlfriend sets off the wild night that ends with a half dozen police cars showing up.

programme.desc: The Mackay Brothers hit the bush and try to dodge destruction. Steve Grahame takes on an old enemy at the worst possible time of the year. Bumpa Farrell struggles for power on a hay convoy of epic proportions.

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America
programme.desc: In Lexington, a '41 Ford comes to life, Calipari checks out UK gear, and Rick gets a surprise gift.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Storage unit auctions are the newest and biggest untapped source for hidden treasures, and opportunistic individuals bid on unclaimed properties hoping to strike gold. In this character-driven treasure hunt, bidders range from twenty-somethings out for fun and adventure, willing to say or do anything to win, to husband and wife teams looking to make fast and large cash, and all are prepared to create quite the drama in the process. It's a dramatic environment as the bidders assess if they think the unit is worth a bid and how high they will actually go. In each self-contained episode, our cast of characters head to storage units and wait anxiously for the big reveal of what is behind the door. The owner of the facility will cut the lock to a delinquent unit and raise the door for the first time, allowing bidders to peer inside for a brief moment, aided only by a flashlight.

programme.title: Outback Car Hunters
programme.desc: A 4WD outback pioneer gets a beachy makeover and the boys fall for a rare 1966 beauty, only to find that love gets complicated.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For over a decade, the drivers have battled it all from ferocious storms to freezing temperatures to bitter rivalries. And, of course, they've confronted the deadly ice crossings that have tested their ability to survive. But now, as this program is in its landmark 11th season, a sense of urgency descends on the drivers. The roads are opening late and closing early. Every load could be the last one to make it up the trails. At any time, the roads could be shut down and tens of thousands of tons in freight won't be delivered. It's a rush from day one and the mission is clear: pedal to the metal and never let up. The communities are counting on them now more than ever.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
